name: Immanuel Lutheran School
description: Come play pickleball at Immanuel Lutheran School in Mankato, MN! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Lake Crystal Area Rec Center
description: Lake Crystal Area Rec Center is a place to play pickleball in Lake Crystal, MN. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Mankato Family YMCA
description: Mankato Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Mankato, MN. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Mankato West High School
description: Mankato West High School is a place to play pickleball in Mankato, MN. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Picklebarn
description: Picklebarn is a place to play pickleball in Mankato, MN. There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and locker rooms.

name: Prairie Winds Middle School
description: Prairie Winds Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mankato, MN. There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Tourtellotte Park
description: Tourtellotte Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mankato, MN. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights. The courts cannot be reserved.
